eligibility.label: Minimum personal net worth of $300,000 CAD
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Personal net worth ($${personalNetWorth}) is below the $300,000 minimum required

eligibility.label: Minimum $150,000 CAD personal investment in an NWT business
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Investment capacity ($${investmentCapacity}) is below the $150,000 minimum

eligibility.label: Minimum 3 years of business ownership or senior management experience
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Business ownership/management experience does not meet the 3-year minimum
